home.heroDesc: Over 30 years of expertise delivering embedded computing, industrial PCs, and safety-critical systems for defense, aerospace, railway, and industrial applications.
home.consultDesc: Our engineers provide end-to-end consulting — from platform selection and system design to deployment and ongoing support — for your mission-critical applications.
home.serviceDesc: We support every stage of your project — from initial system consulting through to final delivery.
home.aboutDesc:
AceTec has been a trusted partner in embedded computing and industrial technology solutions since 1994.
For over three decades, AceTec has stood at the intersection of global embedded technology and Korea's most demanding industries. What began as a specialized distributor has evolved into a full-spectrum technology partner — one that not only supplies world-class hardware and software through our own R&D center, but engineers custom solutions from the ground up.

We pioneered Korea's first desktop-type fanless industrial PC, setting an industry benchmark that still defines our approach today. Our platforms currently operate inside naval combat systems, railway interlocking networks, steel mill production lines, and defense simulation environments.

Backed by strategic partnerships with Abaco Systems, HIMA, Wind River, RTI, OKTAL-SE, Cambridge Pixel, OneStopSystems, Pentek, and SMART Embedded Computing, we deliver proven global technology with deep local engineering expertise. Our clients — from the Agency for Defense Development to POSCO, Hyundai, and Hanwha Systems — trust us because we deliver outcomes, not just products.
home.contactDesc: Whether you need a product quote, technical consultation, or want to explore a partnership, our engineering team is ready to help.
home.solutionsDesc: Backed by our in-house R&D center and decades of domain expertise, AceTec delivers tailored technology solutions for defense, aerospace, railway, and industrial automation — all KC certified and ISO 9001 compliant.
home.embeddedComputingDesc: Board-level signal processing systems — including Jade, Cobalt, Onyx, Talon, Flexor, and Spark platforms — engineered for demanding defense and aerospace environments.
home.industrialNetworkingDesc: KC certified, ISO 9001 compliant fanless PCs, rackmount servers, and network appliances built for continuous 24/7 operation in demanding industrial environments.
home.safetyCriticalDesc: TÜV SÜD SIL4 certified HIMA ControlSafe™ platforms for railway signaling and train control — fail-safe, fault-tolerant architecture ensuring the highest level of operational safety.
home.telecomNetworkingDesc: Intel/AMD-based network appliances for firewall, VPN, UTM, and load balancing — paired with high-performance NICs for data center and telecom infrastructure.
home.sensorSimDesc: OKTAL-SE high-fidelity EO/IR/RF sensor simulation for Hardware-In-the-Loop, Man-In-the-Loop, and training simulation environments.
home.hpcDesc: As Big Data, UHD/FHD, and Simulation demands grow, HPC requirements are increasing across government, academia, and research labs. High Density Compute Accelerators deliver differentiated HPC through GPU-based processing.
home.consultDesignDesc: We assess your project requirements and architect a tailored system design — ensuring the optimal hardware, software, and integration approach from day one.
home.constructSupportDesc: We guide procurement and system build-out, then provide hands-on technical support for the deployed solution throughout your project lifecycle.
home.verifyInspectDesc: Rigorous testing and evaluation to verify that every delivered system meets your project specifications, industry standards, and performance benchmarks.
home.aboutCompanyDesc: Since 1994, AceTec has been at the forefront of Korea's embedded computing and industrial technology market. With our own R&D center and strategic partnerships with Abaco Systems, HIMA, Wind River, RTI, OKTAL-SE, and OSS, we deliver mission-critical solutions for defense, aerospace, railway, and industrial automation — backed by 30+ years of deep engineering expertise.
home.companyDesc: Trusted for over 30 years in embedded computing, industrial PCs, and safety-critical systems — serving defense, aerospace, railway, and industrial markets.
home.ipcDesc: Comprehensive technology solutions from government workstations to special-purpose computing, defense systems, industrial HMI, and semiconductor quality inspection equipment.
home.radarDesc: End-to-end radar data processing — from signal generation and acquisition to precision analysis, target tracking, multi-channel recording, and integrated situational visualization.
home.interconnectDesc: Build ultra-fast computing clusters using proprietary PCIe-based communication protocols that minimize data transfer latency between servers, GPUs, and storage, operating multiple nodes as a single unified system.

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.desc: End-to-end technology solutions for defense, aerospace, rail, telecom, and industrial automation — spanning hardware selection, system integration, and lifecycle support.
solutions.requestQuoteDesc: Share your project requirements and our engineering team will deliver a tailored solution proposal within two business days.

solutionCards.militaryDesc: Rugged VPX/VME boards and signal processing platforms purpose-built for precision strike, C2, surveillance, and unmanned systems in the most demanding operational environments.
solutionCards.railwayDesc: TÜV SÜD SIL4 certified HIMA ControlSafe™ platforms for CBTC, interlocking, and train control — delivering the highest safety integrity levels in rail signaling.
solutionCards.telecomDesc: Intel/AMD-based network appliances for firewall, VPN, UTM, and load balancing — along with high-performance NIC adapters for data center and telecom infrastructure.
solutionCards.automationDesc: Fanless industrial PCs, network appliances, and IoT platforms for factory automation, process control, semiconductor manufacturing, and quality inspection.
solutionCards.sensorDesc: High-fidelity EO/IR/RF sensor simulation from OKTAL-SE for Hardware-In-the-Loop, Man-In-the-Loop, and training environments across defense and aerospace programs.
solutionCards.labDesc: From embedded hardware design to software algorithms, we research the entire process of specialized control systems and achieve technological internalization.
solutionCards.hpcDesc: As Big Data, UHD/FHD, and Simulation demands grow, HPC requirements are increasing across government, academia, and research labs. High Density Compute Accelerators deliver differentiated HPC through GPU-based processing.
solutionCards.aiDesc: Our core expertise lies in Image Processing Algorithm Research, including GPU-accelerated high-speed processing, FPGA IP design, and High-performance Embedded System architecture.
solutionCards.ipcDesc: Boxtype, rackmount, server, desktop, wall-mount, and panel PCs for 24/7 industrial operation — fanless designs, wide temperature, and KC/ISO certified.
solutionCards.radarDesc: High-performance radar scan conversion, target tracking, and display solutions from Cambridge Pixel — SPx Server, HPx acquisition cards, and integrated radar visualization systems.
solutionCards.interconnectDesc: Utilizing proprietary PCIe-based communication protocols to minimize data transfer latency between servers, GPUs, and storage, building ultra-fast computing clusters that operate multiple nodes as a single unified system.

applications.title: Applications
applications.desc: See how AceTec platforms are deployed across defense, rail transportation, telecommunications, and industrial sectors — wherever uptime and reliability are non-negotiable.
applications.ch1Meta: Precision Strike · C2 · Surveillance · Unmanned Systems
applications.ch2Meta: CBTC · PTC · ATP · ATO · ATS · Interlocking
applications.ch4Meta: Accelerator · Broadcast · Power Generation · Data Processing
applications.ch5Meta: EO/IR · RF · Active EO · GNSS · HWIL · MITL
applications.ch7Meta: Image Processing · GPU · FPGA · Embedded Design
applications.faq1A: AceTec serves the military & aerospace, rail transportation, telecom & networking, industrial automation, high-performance computing, and sensor simulation sectors — primarily across Korea and the broader Asia-Pacific region.
applications.faq2A: Yes. Our R&D center and engineering team provide custom system integration, hardware modification, and software development services tailored to your specific project requirements.
applications.faq3Q: What certifications do your products hold?
applications.faq3A: Depending on the product line, certifications include KC (Korea Certification), ISO 9001 Quality Management, TÜV SÜD SIL4 for railway safety systems, and MIL-STD compliance for defense-grade hardware.
applications.faq4Q: How can I request a product demonstration?
applications.faq4A: Submit an inquiry through our contact form or call us directly. Our technical team can arrange on-site demonstrations, remote sessions, or provide evaluation units for qualified projects.

about.title: About
about.highlightFirstDesc: Desktop-type fanless industrial PC with US-patented natural cooling technology
about.highlightRndDesc: In-house research and development for custom embedded solutions
about.highlightCertDesc: ISO-9001, KC Certification, K Mark, SIL4 safety integrity
about.whoWeArePara1: For over three decades, AceTec has stood at the intersection of global embedded technology and Korea's most demanding industries. What began as a specialized distributor has evolved into a full-spectrum technology partner — one that not only supplies world-class hardware and software, but engineers custom solutions from the ground up through our own R&D center.
about.whoWeArePara2: We pioneered Korea's first desktop-type fanless industrial PC, setting an industry benchmark that still defines our approach: solve real problems with robust, purpose-built technology. Today, our platforms operate inside naval combat systems, railway interlocking networks, steel mill production lines, and defense simulation environments — anywhere failure is not an option.
about.whoWeArePara3: Backed by strategic partnerships with Abaco Systems, HIMA, Wind River, RTI, OKTAL-SE, Cambridge Pixel, OneStopSystems, Pentek, and SMART Embedded Computing, we bring proven global technology with deep local engineering expertise. Our clients — from the Agency for Defense Development and POSCO to Hyundai and Hanwha Systems — trust us because we deliver not just products, but outcomes.
about.ceoQuote: Our mission is to deliver the most reliable embedded solutions where failure is simply not an option.
about.ceoPara1: Since our founding in 1994, AceTec has spent over 30 years building deep expertise in the embedded computing industry. We started with a vision to bring world-class embedded technology to Korea's most demanding sectors — and today that vision drives everything we do.
about.ceoPara2: We were the first in Korea to develop a desktop-type fanless industrial PC, earning a US patent for our natural cooling technology. This pioneering spirit continues to define us — we don't just distribute technology, we engineer solutions that our clients can stake their operations on.
about.ceoPara3: Through strategic partnerships with leading global companies including Abaco Systems, HIMA, Wind River, and RTI, we combine proven international technology with our own deep local engineering expertise. Our in-house R&D center allows us to customize and validate every solution before it reaches the field.
about.ceoPara4: As embedded systems become ever more critical in defense, transportation, energy, and industrial automation, AceTec will continue to grow as a trusted partner — delivering technology that performs when it matters most.
about.ceoSignature: — Jang Jeong Hoon, CEO, AceTec Co., Ltd.
about.philosophySub: Three principles that guide every decision we make
about.philosophy1Desc: We place customer success at the center of our business. Every product, every project, and every support interaction is measured by one standard: did we exceed expectations? Our 300+ institutional clients and 487+ project deliveries reflect our relentless commitment to results.
about.philosophy2Desc: Technology partnerships thrive on transparency and trust. We maintain open, proactive communication with our clients and global partners alike — ensuring that requirements are understood, timelines are met, and challenges are addressed before they become problems.
about.philosophy3Desc: At our core, we are engineers. We invest continuously in R&D, maintain deep technical expertise across embedded platforms, and stay ahead of industry evolution. From VxWorks BSP porting to SIL4-certified safety systems, our technical depth is our competitive advantage.
about.cultureSub: The values that define how we work and grow together
about.culture1Desc: We encourage innovative thinking and creative problem-solving. When standard solutions fall short, we engineer new ones — like our patented fanless cooling technology that set a national benchmark.
about.culture2Desc: Passion for technology and care for our people. We foster a supportive environment where expertise is shared, mentorship is valued, and every team member contributes to our collective mission.
about.culture3Desc: We embrace difficult problems. From mission-critical defense systems to nuclear power plant controls, we take on the projects that demand the highest standards — and deliver every time.
about.partnerCtaDesc: Seeking a technology partner for your next program? Share your requirements and our team will respond within one business day.

history.title: History & Reference
history.desc: Over 30 years of innovation in embedded computing, defense systems, and industrial technology — from 1994 to today.

interconnect.s0p0f:
• Performance: PCIe Gen5 (32 GT/s) with full backward compatibility (1.0–5.0), ultra-low latency (chip 100ns / app-to-app 600ns)
  • Connectivity: Quad SFF-8614 x4 connectors with passive copper cable support
  • Hardware: Microchip Switchtec® Gen 5.0 PFX, LP-HL (Low Profile, Half Length) form factor, status LEDs
  • Key Features: RDMA (PIO/DMA), clock isolation with CFC/SSC auto-support, built-in EEPROM for multi-configuration
  • Software: eXpressWare™ software license included
interconnect.s0p1f:
• Performance: PCIe Gen4 (16 GT/s) with backward compatibility (Gen1–4), Microchip PM40036-PFX chipset, sub-100ns cut-through latency
  • Connectivity: Quad SFF-8644, copper & fiber-optic cable support, CMI & non-CMI compatible
  • Flexible Port Config: 1×x16, 2×x8, or 4×x4 configurations
  • Clustering: 2–5 node cluster support, up to 64–128 nodes with MXS924
  • Key Features: RDMA (PIO & DMA*), Full Host Clock Isolation, CFC/SSC, built-in EEPROM (*DMA under development)
  • Hardware: LP (Low Profile) form factor, front-panel link status LEDs
interconnect.s0p2f:
• Performance: PCIe Gen4 (16 GT/s), backward compatible (Gen1–4), sub-100ns cut-through, Microchip PM40036-PFX
  • Connectivity: Quad SFF-8644, copper & fiber-optic, CMI-enabled PCIe 4.0 cable compatible
  • Flexible Port Config: Configurable as 1×x16, 2×x8, or 4×x4
  • Scalability: Combine with MXS924 for large-scale I/O Expansion Systems
  • Hardware & Reliability: LP form factor, Clock Isolation, CFC/SSC, front LEDs, custom EEPROM
interconnect.s0p3f:
• Performance: PCIe Gen3 (8.0 Gbps/lane), backward compatible (Gen1–3), RDMA (PIO & DMA)
  • Flexible Port Config: 4× x4 Gen3 cable ports, configurable as 1×x16 or 2×x8
  • Connectivity: SFF-8644 (iPass+ HD / MiniSAS-HD®), copper & fiber-optic
  • Bridging: Up to 2 NTB ports, full host clock isolation, CFC/SSC support
  • Hardware: LP form factor, front link status LEDs, built-in EEPROM
interconnect.s1p0f:
• Performance: PCIe 4.0 (16 GT/s), backward compatible (Gen 1–4), Microchip PFX Gen4 chipset
  • Ports: 24× PCIe 4.0 x4 ports (SFF-8644), copper & fiber-optic, hot-plug capable
  • Management: Ethernet-based remote management & monitoring, front-panel LEDs
  • Hardware: Standard 19" 1U rackmount chassis, scalable multi-switch configurations

hpc.s0p0f: • 1U NEBS-compliant server with Intel 5500 series Server Board, two Intel Xeon quad-core processors, 550W AC/DC or dual 750W power supplies
hpc.s0p1f: • 2U server revolutionizing homogenous systems with closely coupled processors, solid-state storage and accelerator co-processing (GPGPUs, Intel Xeon Phi, FPGAs)
hpc.s0p2f:
• OSS offers custom server configurations for rackmount, specialized, military rugged, high density, and HPC variations
  • Optimized for PCIe over Cable Expansion
hpc.s1p0f:
• CUBE desktop enclosure supports one double-wide or two single-wide full-height I/O cards up to 13.25 inch long
  • Includes PCIe cable adapter/cable or Thunderbolt cable and 180W power supply
hpc.s1p1f:
• uCUBE desktop enclosure supports one full-height I/O card up to 9.55 inch long
  • Includes PCIe cable adapter/cable and 84W external power supply
hpc.s2p0f: • CUBE desktop enclosure supports one double-wide or two single-wide full-height I/O cards up to 13.25 inch long with PCIe cable adapter/cable or Thunderbolt cable and 180W power supply

military.s0p0f:
• VME: Winning over the long term
  • Launched in 1981, the large majority of open architecture rugged systems around the world today are based on the VME architecture
military.s0p1f:
• In 2006, launched the SBC340, the industry's first 3U VPX single board computer
  • Solutions in all shapes and sizes for any systems architecture, form factor, and interface requirements
military.s0p2f: • Key members of Abaco's HPEC solution include the SWE540 fully managed 6U VPX 40/10GigE Data Plane Ethernet switch (NETernity SWE540), Layer 2/3 managed switching and routing
military.s0p3f: • Now into its third decade, CompactPCI still makes it possible to leverage Intel Core i7 and NXP QorIQ processor technology in proven rugged form factors
military.s0p4f:
• Abaco Systems has expertise in military, commercial and telecommunications markets
  • In-depth understanding of application requirements and communication protocols
military.s0p5f: • Abaco's range of high performance XMCs supports demanding networking, I/O and processing needs of advanced applications
military.s0p6f: • Perhaps the industry's broadest range of mezzanines to take advantage of FPGA technology power and flexibility
military.s1p0f:
• RTI Connext DDS Professional is the first connectivity software for Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT)
  • Delivers low-latency, high reliability, scalability and security for mission-critical systems
military.s1p1f: • RTI Connext DDS Secure enables IIoT architects to build secure and scalable systems of systems with fine-grained security on Connext Databus
military.s1p2f:
• Connext DDS Micro for distributed IIoT systems meeting stringent Size, Weight and Power (SWaP) requirements
  • Small-footprint connectivity framework
military.s1p3f:
• RTI Connext DDS Cert enables IIoT architects to build safety-critical systems
  • Only off-the-shelf connectivity framework certifiable for highest safety standards
military.s2p0f: • SPx Server is a multi-function radar processor providing radar distribution, plot extraction and target tracking
military.s2p1f: • RadarView is Cambridge Pixel's Windows-based application for capture and visualization of primary radar video from remote server, network interface, or HPx capture card
military.s2p2f: • SPx Radar Simulator is a Windows-based application generating simulated radar video data over network socket, with terrain elevation data for realistic radar returns
military.s2p3f: • Cambridge Pixel's SPx Development software for developers incorporating radar processing or display capabilities
military.s2p4f: • SPx Fusion fuses observations from multiple independent sensors into a single stream of correlated reports
military.s2p5f: • Cambridge Pixel's RDR provides full-featured, multichannel record and replay for radar video, target tracks, AIS, ADS-B, IFF and navigation data simultaneously
military.s2p6f: • VSD application interfaces to radars and cameras providing a readymade situational awareness display
military.s2p7f: • ASD-100 is Cambridge Pixel's PC-based air surveillance display for primary and secondary radar data
military.s2p8f: • SPx-Scan software-based radar scan converter for Windows and Linux/X11, simplifying radar integration into graphics applications
military.s2p9f: • SPx Radar Image Server (RIS) is a scan conversion server that captures and scan converts radar video into images delivered to clients or web browsers
military.s2p10f: • SPx AV is Cambridge Pixel's audio and video streaming software for compression, distribution and recording from multiple sources
military.s2p11f: • HPx-346 is a small form factor combined analogue radar input and network distribution card
military.s2p12f: • HPx-400e is a high-performance PCIe dual-stream radar acquisition card capturing analogue and digital primary radar video from up to two radars
military.s2p13f: • HPx-300 Radar Signal Output card generates representative radar signals for testing, simulation, training or streaming
military.s2p14f: • HPx-250 is a high-performance PMC-based radar acquisition card capturing one or two analogue and up to 2 bits of digital primary radar video
military.s2p15f: • HPx-200 is a high-performance PCI-based radar acquisition card capturing one or two analogue or up to 8 bits of digital primary radar video

radar.s0p0f: • SPx Server is a multi-function radar processor providing radar distribution, plot extraction and target tracking
radar.s0p1f: • RadarView is Cambridge Pixel's Windows-based application for capture and visualization of primary radar video from remote server, network interface, or HPx capture card
radar.s0p2f: • SPx Radar Simulator is a Windows-based application generating simulated radar video data over network socket, with terrain elevation data for realistic radar returns
radar.s0p3f: • Cambridge Pixel's SPx Development software for developers incorporating radar processing or display capabilities
radar.s0p4f: • SPx Fusion fuses observations from multiple independent sensors into a single stream of correlated reports
radar.s0p5f: • Cambridge Pixel's RDR provides full-featured, multichannel record and replay for radar video, target tracks, AIS, ADS-B, IFF and navigation data simultaneously
radar.s0p6f: • VSD application interfaces to radars and cameras providing a readymade situational awareness display
radar.s0p7f: • ASD-100 is Cambridge Pixel's PC-based air surveillance display for primary and secondary radar data
radar.s0p8f: • SPx-Scan software-based radar scan converter for Windows and Linux/X11, simplifying radar integration into graphics applications
radar.s0p9f: • SPx Radar Image Server (RIS) is a scan conversion server that captures and scan converts radar video into images delivered to clients or web browsers
radar.s0p10f: • SPx AV is Cambridge Pixel's audio and video streaming software for compression, distribution and recording from multiple sources
radar.s0p11f: • HPx-346 is a small form factor combined analogue radar input and network distribution card
radar.s0p12f: • HPx-400e is a high-performance PCIe dual-stream radar acquisition card capturing analogue and digital primary radar video from up to two radars
radar.s0p13f: • HPx-300 Radar Signal Output card generates representative radar signals for testing, simulation, training or streaming
radar.s0p14f: • HPx-250 is a high-performance PMC-based radar acquisition card capturing one or two analogue and up to 2 bits of digital primary radar video
radar.s0p15f: • HPx-200 is a high-performance PCI-based radar acquisition card capturing one or two analogue or up to 8 bits of digital primary radar video

railway.s0p0f: • HiMax is a range of flexible COTS control system for safety-critical rail industry applications with high performance requirements
railway.s0p1f:
• HIMatrix is a range of versatile COTS controllers for small to mid-scale safety-critical rail applications
  • Pre-certified CENELEC SIL 4, compact, vibration/shock resistant

sensor.s0p0f: • SE-Workbench-EO has been designed for the creation of synthetic models of complex environments that have to be as realistic as possible in order to stimulate systems using sensors in the EO domain
sensor.s0p1f: • SE-FAST-HWIL is the real time image generator package designed to deliver high realistic infrared (IR) images at very high frame rates (200Hz and above) in a closed loop mode
sensor.s0p2f:
• Target signature rendering in Electro-Optics domain
  • Tools and data included in SE-WORKBENCH-EOS dedicated to aircraft signature computation in the EO domain
sensor.s0p3f:
• SE-FAST-IG is a high performance visualisation application
  • Driven by users' simulators through its CIGI interface, supports features for flight training, driving simulations, ground warfare
sensor.s1p0f: • The aim of SE-Workbench-RF is to create synthetic models of complex environments for simulating systems with EM sources and sensors, typically radar systems
sensor.s1p1f:
• SE-Workbench-SAR allows computing SAR data with advanced OKTAL-SE software
  • SAR raw data computed using ray-tracing combined with asymptotic methods (GO, PO and ECM)
sensor.s1p2f:
• SE-RAY-RADAR is dedicated to RBGM computing (Real Beam Ground Mapping) of complex 3D scenes
  • Simulates radar frequency, scanning parameters, trajectory embedding, visualization modes
sensor.s2p0f:
• SE-RAY-AEO: Pulsed LASER context, specular predominant cover
  • Simulation of range gating capacities and detection/identification of metallic or dielectric targets
sensor.s3p0f:
• SE-NAV is a propagation simulator for assessment of signals reception in stringent environments
  • Predicts performance of GPS, GALILEO, BEIDOU or pseudolites in 3D virtual scenes
sensor.s4p0f:
• SE-Workbench Special Tool-Kits (TK) for expert users
  • APIs for refined preparation of scenarios and dynamic modification during rendering
sensor.s4p1f:
• Enhanced SE-TOOLKIT functions for dynamic scenario changes in closed loop mode
  • Real-time API-driven modification of 3D scene content during simulation
sensor.s4p2f:
• Common Image Generator Interface (CIGI) protocol support
  • Standard interface for connecting host simulators to image generators
